_comment: Adapter-ready NFL gamelog fixtures (post-parseGamelog shape). Label sets mirror real ESPN responses verified against live `/athletes/{id}/gamelog` calls — passing has CMP/ATT/YDS/CMP%/AVG/TD/INT/LNG/SACK/RTG/QBR; rushing has CAR/YDS/AVG/TD/LNG; receiving has REC/TGTS/YDS/AVG/TD/LNG. Used by dfs-stat-adapters.test.ts to drive every NFL prop adapter against realistic data.

qb_pass_and_rush._player: Jalen Hurts vs DAL — 2025-09-15 (3 pass TDs, 38 rush yds, 1 rush TD)

rb_rush_and_rec._player: Saquon Barkley vs NYG — 2025-10-12 (115 rush yds, 2 rush TD, 4 rec for 28 yds). Receiving comes after rushing for RBs.

wr_receiving_first._player: Justin Jefferson vs CHI — 2025-11-02 (8 rec for 142 yds, 1 TD; receiving comes BEFORE rushing in ESPN's ordering for WRs)

qb_no_rush._player: Patrick Mahomes vs LAC — 2025-09-29 (380 pass yds, 4 TD, 0 INT, no rushing stats)

missing_categories._player: Hypothetical row where ESPN didn't return categories — adapters should return null for all NFL props
